purpose: Runtime controller for the Portal 1 credits animation. It waits for DOMContentLoaded, reads ?autoloop=1 / ?random=1 URL params, applies the Enrichment Center Credits override (reads localStorage.aperture.customCredits / aperture.creditsMode and rewrites window.credits before init), attaches splash dismissal handlers, then on user click/Space (or 5s auto-dismiss when autoloop) starts audio, draws text borders, types lyric and credit data character by character, blinks cursors, and swaps ASCII art according to lyric metadata. When custom credits are present and under 2,500 chars, credits type at the natural 63 ms/char pace; in loop mode the credit column wipes and re-types continuously. When autoloop is active, the audio 'ended' event triggers an 8s pause then reload (or navigation to ../launcher/?random=1 in random mode).
invariants: cake.init must run after the HTML containers exist; it caches lyric and credit containers before scheduling any line rendering.
cake.delayMultiplier is the shared conversion from cakedata delay seconds to milliseconds.
processLyricLine and processCreditLine assume stable global lyrics and credits arrays loaded before this file.

processLetter and setPicture use document.createTextNode (no innerHTML), so HTML special chars need no escaping; a regex substitutes regular space (U+0020) with U+00A0 NBSP so adjacent spaces survive default white-space collapsing.

cake.init runs only after the user dismisses the #splash overlay (click or Space) on DOMContentLoaded, or after the 5s auto-dismiss when ?autoloop=1; the local 'started' flag guards against double-invocation so cake.init runs exactly once per page load.

?autoloop=1 sets cake.autoloop and arms the 5s splash auto-dismiss plus the audio 'ended' listener; ?random=1 sets cake.random and switches the post-credits transition from location.reload() to location.assign('../launcher/?random=1'). Without ?autoloop=1, behavior is unchanged from the static-page case.

applyCustomCredits runs inside DOMContentLoaded before cake.init is reachable; it overwrites window.credits when localStorage.aperture.customCredits is non-empty after trim, and arms cake.useNaturalDelay + cake.customCreditsLoop only when length < 2500.

cake.naturalCreditsDelay = 63 (ms/char) is the Portal 1 natural pace; processCreditLines uses it when cake.useNaturalDelay is true and otherwise falls through to the STRETCH formula creditsMaxTime * 1000 / totalchars.

cake.restartCustomCredits is invoked via setTimeout from processCreditLines only when cake.customCreditsLoop is true; it wipes the credits column (preserving the blinker DOM node + its blink timer), resets lastCreditsIndex, re-runs initCredits, and re-calls processCreditLines — chaining loop iterations indefinitely.
gotchas: The file body is wrapped in an IIFE with 'use strict'; cake is exposed to the page via window.cake = cake so HTML id 'splash' handlers and any inline attribute handlers can still reach it.

setTimeout uses the 3-argument form (callback, delay, ...args) to capture loop-iteration values (text.charAt(x), index) at schedule time so the var-scoped loop variables don't produce the closure trap.
initMusicPlayer relies on the local Still Alive.ogg filename next to index.html.
The DOMContentLoaded handler assumes index.html provides an element with id 'splash'; without it splash.addEventListener throws and the credits never start.
Autoloop transition waits 8s after audio.ended to let trailing credit typing finish; if creditsMaxTime is ever raised above the song length the transition could fire mid-typing.

On autoloop cycle 2+, location.reload() loses the original user gesture; WebView2/browser autoplay policy may block playback. Same-origin media-engagement usually carries through but is not guaranteed (see PHASE6_DESKTOP_APP_PLAN.md risk section).
applyCustomCredits wraps localStorage access in try/catch — Safari private mode and storage-quota errors silently skip the override; the variant then plays the original Portal credits.

restartCustomCredits depends on cake.creditsBlinker being a long-lived DOM node whose blink setTimeout chain captures the same reference. The wipe sets creditsdiv.innerHTML='' which detaches the blinker, then appendChild re-attaches it — the in-flight blink timer survives because it holds the captured reference.

key_functions.name: init
key_functions.summary: Caches DOM containers, draws borders, initializes credits and blinkers, starts audio, then schedules lyric and credit rendering.

key_functions.name: processLyricLine
key_functions.summary: Creates or places a lyric span, optionally clears previous lyrics, changes ASCII art, and schedules per-character typing.

key_functions.name: processCreditLine
key_functions.summary: Maintains a sliding credit window and schedules per-character credit typing using the computed creditsDelay.

key_functions.name: setPicture
key_functions.summary: Renders one asciiart frame into #picturetext with HTML-sensitive characters escaped.

key_functions.name: processCreditLines
key_functions.summary: Computes per-character delay (natural 63ms when useNaturalDelay, otherwise STRETCH math), schedules every credit line for typing, and arms restartCustomCredits when customCreditsLoop is set.

key_functions.name: restartCustomCredits
key_functions.summary: Custom-credits loop hook: wipes credit-line divs (keeping the blinker), resets lastCreditsIndex, re-runs initCredits, re-appends the blinker, and calls processCreditLines to start another typing pass.

key_functions.name: applyCustomCredits
key_functions.summary: Module-scope helper run in DOMContentLoaded; reads localStorage.aperture.customCredits / aperture.creditsMode, replaces window.credits, and arms useNaturalDelay + customCreditsLoop when under 2,500 chars.
